description: Georeference the scanned map image located at /home/ga/GIS_Data/historical_map.png using the pre-existing Ground Control Points (GCPs) from /home/ga/GIS_Data/historical_map.png.points. Use a Polynomial 1 (Affine) or Helmert transformation type with Nearest Neighbour resampling and set the target CRS to EPSG:4326 (WGS 84). Export the georeferenced raster to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/historical_map_georeferenced.tif.
